const { Client } = require('pg');
const client = new Client({
  host: '65.108.106.66', port: 5432,
  database: 'jwwfplhm', user: 'claude_dima',
  password: 'aehTeagh683jfkhhqg926grtj55',
  connectionTimeoutMillis: 15000, ssl: false
});
await client.connect();

// Q1: Nutaku brand names
const q1 = await client.query(`
  SELECT DISTINCT brand, COUNT(*) as cnt
  FROM marketplace
  WHERE LOWER(brand) LIKE '%nutaku%'
     OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%nutaku%'
  GROUP BY brand ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10
`);

// Q2: How are YM orders marked - check external_order_id and order_data
const q2 = await client.query(`
  SELECT 
    external_order_id,
    order_data->>'source' as source,
    order_data->>'channel' as channel,
    order_data->>'payment_method' as payment_method,
    COUNT(*) as cnt
  FROM marketplace_order
  WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND external_order_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
  ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20
`);

// Q3: How marketplace_order links to marketplace (product)
const q3 = await client.query(`
  SELECT 
    order_data->>'productId' as from_productId,
    (content->'items'->0->>'id') as from_content_items_id,
    (content->'items'->0->>'title') as item_title,
    (content->'items'->0->>'brand') as item_brand,
    COUNT(*) as cnt
  FROM marketplace_order
  WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
    AND status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
  ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10
`);

// Q4: Sample completed orders to see full structure
const q4 = await client.query(`
  SELECT 
    id, external_order_id,
    order_data::text as od_sample,
    content::text as content_sample
  FROM marketplace_order
  WHERE status IN ('completed','completed_with_review')
    AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  LIMIT 3
`);

await client.end();

return [{json: {
  q1_nutaku_brands: q1.rows,
  q2_ym_markers: q2.rows,
  q3_order_product_link: q3.rows,
  q4_sample_orders: q4.rows.map(r => ({
    id: r.id,
    external_order_id: r.external_order_id,
    od_sample: r.od_sample?.substring(0,300),
    content_sample: r.content_sample?.substring(0,300)
  }))
}}];
